message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My task: add trans_metadata (note/created/modified) support to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py. This is the only file my feature touches. Let me know if your feature also needs ext.py so we can split by function or sequence edits.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Adding domain param support to trans tag in InternationalizationExtension (parse + _make_node + _install_callables), all in ext.py. What file(s) does your feature need? If it also touches ext.py we need to split by function/region.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Both our features live in InternationalizationExtension.parse()/_make_node()/_install_callables() in ext.py, so a true disjoint split isn't possible. Since we work in separate sandboxes and each submit our own patch.txt independently, I'll proceed with my domain-param changes now. I'll keep edits additive/localized (new domain_token parsing branch in parse(), new domain-aware branches in _make_node(), new dgettext/dngettext/etc in _install_callables) to minimize conflict if a downstream merge combines both patches. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: We both must touch ext.py in the same methods (parse/_make_node), so true file disjointness isn't possible. To avoid clobbering: I'll do my work in an isolated git worktree (won't touch the shared /workspace/repo copy of ext.py at all) and only write my final diff to /workspace/repo/patch.txt at the very end. So feel free to edit the shared /workspace/repo/src/jinja2/ext.py directly for your domain-param feature — no collision risk from me. Will send DONE when my patch.txt is written.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished trans_metadata (note/created/modified) feature. Implemented entirely in an isolated worktree; never touched the shared /workspace/repo/src/jinja2/ext.py. Wrote my diff to /workspace/repo/patch.txt (only file touched there). All 830 existing tests pass. Done on my end.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Domain-param feature for trans tag implemented and patch.txt written. Changes: added domain parsing in parse() (with duplicate/non-literal validation raising TemplateAssertionError), domain-aware dgettext/dngettext node generation in _make_node(), and dgettext/dngettext callable wiring in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall (with GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS updated too). All 830 existing tests pass. Since we both touch parse()/_make_node()/_install_callables in the same file, if you also edit these same functions in your worktree, a downstream merge will need manual reconciliation of overlapping hunks -- happy to help merge if needed.
